units.result_summary: Materialized the built-in dataset and completed the frozen structure, quality, balance, type, duplicate, and leakage-risk audit.
verification_results: The 569-row, 30-feature snapshot matched sklearn.datasets.load_breast_cancer.
Target encoding matched the declared malignant-positive flip.
Missing, non-finite, and exact duplicate feature-target row counts were all zero.

units.result_summary: Ran the frozen stratified dummy and scaled logistic-regression experiment with a leakage-safe pipeline, holdout, repeated CV, predictions, and exact replay.
verification_results: The 455/114 split was stratified, disjoint, and covered all 569 rows once.
Five-fold CV repeated ten times produced 50 validation folds per model on training only.
Logistic holdout ROC AUC was 0.9917328042328042, balanced accuracy 0.9761904761904762, F1 0.975609756097561, with TN=72, FP=0, FN=2, TP=40.
The second run exactly matched the first configuration, metrics, folds, and holdout predictions.

units.result_summary: Computed conditional holdout uncertainty and descriptive cross-validation variability with explicit assumptions and no unjustified significance test.
verification_results: Ten thousand fixed-seed class-stratified bootstrap replicates produced the named holdout intervals.
Wilson intervals were recorded for sensitivity and specificity.
Point estimates and confusion counts matched metrics.json exactly.
No formal significance test was performed because repeated folds are dependent and one holdout cannot establish external superiority.

units.result_summary: Verified design validity, leakage controls, bias, generalization limits, and permitted claims without modifying protected statistics-owner outputs.
verification_results: The verifier wrote only method-review/method-and-claims-review.md.
The uncertainty.json and statistical-review.md hashes were rechecked after verifier output and remained unchanged.
The review permits only non-clinical, descriptive, dataset-specific claims and explicitly rejects clinical and transportability claims.

units.result_summary: Created four accessible, source-mapped PNG figures with matching SVG exports and completed automated plus full-size visual QA.
verification_results: Every plotted value maps to saved CSV or JSON evidence and every PNG/SVG hash matches figure-index.json.
All four PNGs were nonblank and inspected at original resolution.
An overlapping colorbar in the first confusion-matrix render was corrected; the final figures have no clipping, incoherent overlap, or unsupported significance marker.

units.result_summary: Completed the five-pass scientific-writing review and produced a clearer final report without changing scientific content.
verification_results: The review records clutter, voice, sentence architecture, terminology, and numerical/citation passes.
Sample counts, metrics, intervals, significant figures, confusion counts, and figure references were rechecked.
The content-preservation check passed and all non-clinical limitations remain.

units.result_summary: Built the seven-slide group-meeting PPTX with artifact-tool, rendered every slide, source-mapped the deck, and completed automated geometry plus full-size visual QA.
verification_results: The PPTX opened through the local render route and produced seven nonblank 1920 x 1080 slide PNGs.
All 94 artifact-tool object bounds remained inside the 1280 x 720 canvas and final titles were single-line.
Every slide and the montage were inspected; initial title wrapping on slides 4, 5, and 7 was corrected and re-rendered.
The slides_test.py helper failure is disclosed in slides-qa.txt; the final overflow decision passed through object bounds and full-size render inspection.

units.result_summary: Created and verified the case-local CPython 3.12.12 environment, 18-package lock, and executable replay command.
verification_results: Python 3.12.12 and required scientific imports passed.
The 18 locked distributions exactly matched the installed case environment.
reproduce.ps1 executed successfully and the second experiment run exactly matched the first result digest.

units.result_summary: Drafted the evidence-bound scientific report with all four real figures and a machine-readable source map for numerical claims and figure references.
verification_results: The draft covers purpose, data, methods, holdout results, CV variability, uncertainty, reproducibility, limitations, and conclusion.
The source map records 16 numerical or methodological claims and all four figure references.
Every referenced figure exists and the non-clinical boundary is explicit.

units.result_summary: Prepared bilingual candidate README copy, visual guidance, the case manifest, and a failing-on-contradiction cross-artifact verifier.
verification_results: The automated cross-artifact verifier passed 17 of 17 checks with zero failures.
Metrics, intervals, confusion counts, sample counts, model names, CV settings, figure mappings, report text, PPTX text, summaries, paths, and artifact hashes reconcile.
The manifest and summaries explicitly keep publishable README success false until canonical delivery acceptance passes.

criterion_results.details: Passing: CPython 3.12.12, required imports, and all 18 pinned distributions match the case-local environment.
Passing: reproduce.ps1 ran the frozen experiment and the second execution exactly matched the first result digest.
Passing: the 569-row table, 30 features, target flip, and dataset hash agree with the scikit-learn loader.
Passing: the audit covers shape, labels, balance, types, missingness, non-finite values, duplicates, leakage risks, and downstream requirements.
Passing: the frozen dummy and StandardScaler plus LogisticRegression models, fixed seed, stratified 455/114 holdout, 5 x 10 repeated CV, and no-search boundary are preserved.
Passing: required metrics, fold results, predictions, confusion counts, sample counts, model identities, and exact replay evidence exist and reconcile.
Passing: variability and intervals record their method, confidence level, units, assumptions, seed, replicates, and source-file hashes.
Passing: the owner and verifier reject unjustified significance, clinical validity, transportability, causal, and deployment claims.
Passing: four PNGs and matching SVGs map every plotted value to saved evidence and retain verified hashes.
Passing: original-resolution inspection found the final figures readable, accessible, honestly scaled, and free of clipping or incoherent overlap.
Passing: the draft covers purpose, data, methods, results, uncertainty, reproducibility, limitations, and conclusion with all four real figures.
Passing: 16 result or method claims and four figure references have machine-readable source mappings.
Passing: all five required scientific-writing passes and their concrete revisions are recorded.
Passing: the final report is clearer while preserving the dataset, models, split, metrics, intervals, figures, and claim limits.
Passing: the seven-slide PPTX opens through the local render route and every slide renders to a nonblank 1920 x 1080 PNG.
Passing: final geometry, montage, individual slide inspection, source map, title wrapping, placeholders, narrative, and chart-data consistency checks pass; the helper-script failure is disclosed.
Passing: English and Chinese candidate summaries and visual guidance use verified artifacts and explicitly forbid README success before canonical acceptance.
Passing: the executable verifier passed 17 checks and found zero contradictions across metrics, uncertainty, figures, report, PPTX, summaries, manifest, and paths.
